hero.sub:
All your scattered video feedback, now in one place.
From practice to auditions — every artist’s moment, on ZIGG.

service.eyebrow: From A to Z of entertainment
service.h2Rest:
fixes the friction you used to feel
with messenger apps in the performing arts.
service.p1: Built so you can review video feedback at a glance.
service.p2pre: We turn the friction of giving and receiving feedback into
service.p3: Online audition links, expert feedback, and a community where users share info — all in one.

challenge.desc:
Same theme, same stage. Artists take on each other’s videos
and grow together through expert and user feedback.

audition.sub: A global audition held every month with GODITION
audition.bannerEmpty: Passer announcement banners are on the way.
audition.appDesc: Global artists take on the ZIGG x GODITION audition every round.
audition.audDesc: The total number of auditions held on ZIGG x GODITION so far.

teamspace.spaceDesc: Invite the members you’ll prepare a performance with.

spaceAnnots.title: Name your space and build a team
spaceAnnots.desc: The starting point for your team. All videos and feedback gather in one space.

spaceAnnots.title: Invite members by nickname search
spaceAnnots.desc: Search teammates by nickname and invite them straight into your space.

teamspace.historyDesc: Upload and review the practice videos you’ve filmed.

historyAnnots.title: Each video is called a HISTORY
historyAnnots.desc: Drop a quick comment inside a history and the whole team can see it.

historyAnnots.title: Tap a pin to time-skip to the comment
historyAnnots.desc: Tap a comment’s pin and the video jumps right to that moment.

keyfuncs.title: Timestamp PIN
keyfuncs.desc: Pin a comment to the exact moment in a video. Tabbed feedback shows who each comment is for at a glance.

keyfuncs.title: Practice videos in one place
keyfuncs.desc: Archive every practice video by date in your history. Records you used to lose become the team’s asset.

keyfuncs.title: Space · member invites
keyfuncs.desc: Invite the members preparing the performance with you and exchange videos and feedback precisely, as a team.

footer.desc: Every moment of performing arts, together with you.

feedback.msg: The timing of the raise is off! Let’s count in our heads.
